summary: Life Pattern Graph Feature - COMPLETE. Backend: 17/17 tests PASSED. Frontend: All UI components verified. The Life Pattern Graph creates a 24-hour behavioral fingerprint showing movement, interaction, sleep, and anomaly probabilities per hour. It correctly appears in the Device Health expanded panel after Twin Evolution Timeline.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height -1 (Recharts library issue, non-blocking)

TestLifePatternEndpoint.test_returns_correct_structure: PASS - Returns device_id, device_identifier, days_observed, generated_at, pattern, fingerprint, deviations, insights
TestLifePatternEndpoint.test_pattern_has_24_hourly_entries: PASS - Pattern array has 24 entries for hours 0-23
TestLifePatternEndpoint.test_pattern_entry_structure: PASS - Each entry has hour, movement_probability, interaction_probability, sleep_probability, anomaly_probability, avg_events, samples
TestLifePatternEndpoint.test_fingerprint_structure: PASS - Contains wake_time, peak_activity_time, rest_window_time, sleep_time, routine_stability, active_window
TestLifePatternEndpoint.test_deviations_array: PASS - Deviations list with type, hour, description
TestLifePatternEndpoint.test_insights_array: PASS - AI-generated insights about wake time, peak activity, rest window, sleep onset, routine stability
TestLifePatternEndpoint.test_second_device: PASS - DEV-002 returns valid life pattern

TestLifePatternDataContent.test_sleep_probability_higher_at_night: PASS - Night sleep avg higher than day avg

LifePatternGraphComponent.loading_state: PASS - Shows 'Building behavioral fingerprint...' during load
LifePatternGraphComponent.heatmap_metric_rows: PASS - 4 rows for Movement, Interaction, Sleep, Anomaly
LifePatternGraphComponent.fingerprint_panel: PASS - data-testid='life-pattern-fingerprint' with Wake, Peak, Rest, Sleep times
LifePatternGraphComponent.insights_panel: PASS - data-testid='life-pattern-insights' found with AI-generated insights

integration.device_health_panel_position: PASS - Life Pattern Graph appears after Twin Evolution Timeline in expanded device panel

critical_code_review_comments: Backend life_pattern_engine.py correctly aggregates telemetry over 30 days to build hourly probabilities
Backend uses efficient SQL queries to aggregate telemetry, baselines, and anomalies by hour
Backend fingerprint extraction correctly identifies wake time, peak activity, rest window, and sleep onset
Backend deviation detection compares today's behavior against the learned pattern
Backend insights generation provides human-readable AI observations
Backend persists pattern to life_pattern_profiles table with upsert logic
Frontend LifePatternGraph.jsx correctly renders heatmap with color interpolation for probability values
Frontend uses proper data-testid attributes for all interactive and informational elements
Frontend fingerprint panel shows all 4 key behavioral landmarks with appropriate icons
Frontend correctly handles loading, error, and success states
context_for_next_testing_agent: Life Pattern Graph feature fully tested. API endpoint GET /api/operator/devices/{device_id}/life-pattern returns: pattern (24 hourly entries with movement/interaction/sleep/anomaly probabilities), fingerprint (wake/peak/rest/sleep times + routine_stability), deviations (today's deviations from pattern), and insights (AI-generated observations). The days parameter accepts 7-90 (default 30). Frontend component renders in Device Health expanded panel after Twin Evolution Timeline with heatmap, fingerprint, deviations, and insights panels. All data-testid attributes work correctly.
